posts.message:
🛸 THEY CALL IT CHICKEN.
WE CALL IT A CLOSE ENCOUNTER.

Not all chicken is created equal.

At Roswell Family Farm, our chickens are raised on pasture with room to roam, fresh air, sunshine, and the care that only a family farm can provide.

Whether you’re looking for:

🐔 Whole Chickens
🍗 Wings
🍗 Drumsticks
🍗 Thighs
🍗 Leg Quarters
🍗 Breasts

…you’re getting chicken raised the way nature intended.

No added water.
No fillers.
No mystery.

Just real chicken from a local family farm.

And yes, our tenderloin stays attached to the breast where nature intended—because a chicken breast should actually be a chicken breast.

📍 Roswell Family Farm
🛣 I-90 Exit 29A – Dolgeville, NY

The truth is out there…

SO IS BETTER CHICKEN.

Fresh from our pastures to your table.

🛸 Before you go…

What’s your favorite cut of chicken?

🍗 Wings
🍗 Thighs
🍗 Drumsticks
🍗 Leg Quarters
🍗 Breasts
🐔 Whole Chicken

Let us know below!

#RoswellFamilyFarm #AbductedByFlavor #PastureRaised #PastureRaisedChicken #FarmFresh #FarmToTable #EatLocal #KnowYourFarmer #FamilyFarm #DolgevilleNY #MohawkValley #HerkimerCounty #UpstateNY #ShopLocal #LocalFood #ChickenDinner #WholeChicken #ChickenWings #ChickenThighs #ChickenDrumsticks #SupportLocalFarmers

We seriously cannot wait to see you all tomorrow! 
Don’t forget to stop by our spot at the Violet Festival!! 🐐🐓🐖🦆🦃

🌈🎃 Sometimes the farm gives us a little reminder to slow down and take it all in.
A beautiful rainbow stretched across our fields and pumpkin patch tonight, and it couldn't have been a more perfect sight. Moments like these make all the early mornings, muddy boots, and hard work worth it.
We're counting down the days until pumpkin season, when these fields will be filled with families, laughter, and little feet searching for the perfect pumpkin.
Until then, we're enjoying the view and feeling grateful for another season on the farm. 💛
Who else believes a rainbow over a pumpkin patch is a sign that fall is going to be a good one? 🌈🍂🎃
#RoswellFamilyFarm #PumpkinPatch #FarmLife #RainbowMagic #FallIsComing
